artifact_or_test_id: docs/references/context-efficiency.md 'floored per artifact'; 1t3s7 change doc 'floored at zero per artifact'; pre-repair wrapper aggregate floor
command_or_fixture: operator full static review of all seven changes; confirmed against server_impl.py wrapper credit computation and both contract docs
counterexample_or_failure_condition: Any multi-artifact response with a request between the largest single artifact and the artifact sum earns unearned credit.
expected: Two 100-token artifacts against a 150-token request credit zero (each floors independently).
known_bad_detection_method: operator static review; the new boundary-case regression test fails against the aggregate implementation
limitations: Overstatement bounded by request size per event; no stored historical rows are affected retroactively.
observed: Aggregate implementation credited 50; extractors returned pre-summed totals so the wrapper could not floor per artifact. Confirmed by code read of _wrap_first_party_tool_costs and _artifact_file_tokens.
proposition: The 1t3s7 wrapper computed max(0, sum(artifacts) - request) — one aggregate floor — while both the change doc and the reference doc state credit is floored at zero PER ARTIFACT, so a request larger than each individual output but smaller than their combined size incorrectly earned credit.
safety_and_authorization: Repo-contained code review only.

disposition_rationale: Contract-restoring bounded repair inside the wrapper and its two extractors; regression test constructs the exact boundary case.

artifact_or_test_id: pre-repair wrapper uuid4 fallback; 1t3s7 change doc replay-dedup requirement
command_or_fixture: operator full static review; confirmed by code read of _artifact_from_written_paths and the wrapper's event_id fallback
counterexample_or_failure_condition: Repeated identical calls (e.g. a re-validated memory record) accumulate unbounded duplicate credit.
expected: An identical replay of an artifact call records once; only a genuinely different outcome records a new event.
known_bad_detection_method: operator static review; the new replay regression test fails against the uuid4 fallback
limitations: Practical exposure was limited (most writers error or write nothing on replay) but memory_validate legitimately re-credits on every identical call.
observed: _artifact_from_written_paths returns (tokens, None); the wrapper falls back to uuid.uuid4().hex, defeating the store's event-id replay dedup for memory_propose, memory_add, memory_validate, memory_backfill, and the ten wf_new_* scaffolds.
proposition: Every artifact-writing tool except wf_review_evidence returned no stable event identity, so the wrapper minted a fresh uuid4 per call and idempotent replays that report the same written paths earned derived-artifact credit repeatedly.
safety_and_authorization: Repo-contained code review only.

disposition_rationale: Bounded repair in the wrapper only: derive a stable identity from the canonical request plus response serialization, preserving debit recording for different outcomes of identical requests.

artifact_or_test_id: pre-repair request_arguments literal at the code_risk_score registration
command_or_fixture: operator full static review; confirmed against the code_risk_score registration in server_impl.py
counterexample_or_failure_condition: Any invocation varying layer or include_tests records an identical, smaller request than was actually made.
expected: The recorded request mirrors every argument of the actual call.
known_bad_detection_method: operator static review; the new source-census test fails against the incomplete literal
limitations: Debit undercount of a few tokens per call; no credit affected.
observed: request_arguments dict at the 1t15a registration wrap omitted layer and include_tests; confirmed by code read.
proposition: code_risk_score's retrieval instrumentation recorded only scope/top/max_hops as request arguments, omitting layer and include_tests, so request debit was undercounted and the telemetry did not reflect the actual invocation.
safety_and_authorization: Repo-contained code review only.

disposition_rationale: Two-key addition at the single registration site; a source-census regression test pins the complete argument set.

artifact_or_test_id: test_artifact_credit_floors_per_artifact_not_aggregate; _artifact_file_token_list; per-record review-evidence serialization
command_or_fixture: python3 -B -m unittest tests.test_server_context_efficiency tests.test_context_efficiency (110 OK)
counterexample_or_failure_condition: The boundary-case test fails if aggregate flooring returns.
expected: Two 100-token artifacts against a ~150-token request credit exactly zero.
known_bad_detection_method: the regression test fails against the pre-repair aggregate floor
limitations: Full-suite confirmation attaches at reverification.
observed: New regression test constructs that boundary case and passes; the aggregate implementation fails it. Focused suites 110/110 OK.
proposition: Extractors now return per-artifact token lists (_artifact_file_token_list; per-record serialization for review evidence) and the wrapper sums max(0, artifact - request) per artifact, restoring the documented contract.
safety_and_authorization: Repo-contained edit and hermetic tests only.

disposition_rationale: Contract-restoring repair confined to the wrapper and its two extractors; no schema or response shape change.

artifact_or_test_id: test_artifact_replay_without_operation_digest_dedupes; wrapper stable-identity fallback
command_or_fixture: python3 -B -m unittest tests.test_server_context_efficiency tests.test_context_efficiency (110 OK)
counterexample_or_failure_condition: The replay test fails if uuid4 identities return.
expected: Identical write replay records once; an idempotent second run that writes nothing records a new zero-credit event.
known_bad_detection_method: the replay regression test fails against the uuid4 fallback
limitations: Full-suite confirmation attaches at reverification.
observed: New regression test drives memory_backfill through write/replay/empty and sees exactly two rows (one credited, one zero); focused suites 110/110 OK.
proposition: When an artifact extractor supplies no operation digest, the wrapper now derives event_id from sha256(tool + canonical request + canonical response): identical replays share an identity and dedup in the store, while a different outcome of the same request still records its debits.
safety_and_authorization: Repo-contained edit and hermetic tests only.

disposition_rationale: Wrapper-only repair; wf_review_evidence's own operation digest remains authoritative where present.

proposition: The code_risk_score registration now records all five invocation arguments (scope, top, max_hops, layer, include_tests), and a source-census test pins the complete set.
safety_and_authorization: Repo-contained edit and hermetic tests only.

artifact_or_test_id: canonical suite 6,024/6,024; test_artifact_credit_floors_per_artifact_not_aggregate, test_artifact_replay_without_operation_digest_dedupes, test_risk_score_registration_records_complete_request_arguments; prior cycles' live probes and oracles unchanged
command_or_fixture: python3 run_tests.py (6,024 OK); operator static-review findings verified against code, repaired, and reverified with regression tests; all prior cycles' evidence unchanged
counterexample_or_failure_condition: the approval predates an affected repair or is not independently grounded
expected: Terminal heads on all six finding chains, clean suite on the final tree, unanimous seats.
known_bad_detection_method: approval evidence and affected-lane chronology were checked
limitations: Inline single-session council per this repo's accepted format; historical store rows written before the cycle-4 repairs are not retroactively adjusted (bounded, disclosed in the reverifications); wf_sync_surfaces credit remains deferred by recorded decision.
observed: Cycle 4 chains terminal (per-artifact floor verified at the exact boundary case; stable replay identity verified on both sides; complete risk_score arguments pinned by census test); canonical suite 6,024/6,024 OK uncontended on the final tree; server reloaded; unanimous.
proposition: All seven implemented changes of wave 1t3ek deliver their required ACs; all six findings across five repair cycles — including the three from the operator's full static review (per-artifact floor, replay identity, risk_score request completeness) — are repaired and independently reverified; this approval supersedes all prior delivery approvals and follows every repair.
safety_and_authorization: Local review evidence only; no external side effects.
